title: CONTAINER_RUN
description: Container execution artifact. Produced by Worker via container_runner when container_required=true. Consumed by Auditor. ADR-021.

run_id.description: Unique identifier for this container run.

work_packet_id.description: References the WORK_PACKET that initiated this container run.

container_profile.description: Container runtime profile. Must match WORK_PACKET.container_profile.

container_target.description: Repo path or service name. Must match WORK_PACKET.container_target.

image_digest.description: Docker image digest used for execution. Ensures reproducibility.

build_log.description: Path to build log artifact or inline build output summary.

test_results.description: Test results from container execution. Empty array if no tests.

exit_code.description: Container process exit code. 0 = success. Non-zero = failure.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of container run completion.
